insights.message: Good return on equity — ROE 16.3% in FY2025
High-margin business — Net Profit Margin 24.9% in FY2025
Profits are cash-backed — CFO/Net Profit ratio 2.41x in FY2025
Strong Free Cash Flow generation — 57.7% margin in FY2025
